blockchain-security-auditor.description: Expert smart contract security auditor specializing in vulnerability detection, formal verification, exploit analysis, and comprehensive audit report writing for DeFi protocols and blockchain applications.

zk-steward.name: ZK Steward
zk-steward.description: Knowledge-base steward in the spirit of Niklas Luhmann's Zettelkasten. Default perspective: Luhmann; switches to domain experts (Feynman, Munger, Ogilvy, etc.) by task. Enforces atomic notes, connectivity, and validation loops. Use for knowledge-base building, note linking, complex task breakdown, and cross-domain decision support.

supply-chain-strategist.name: Supply Chain Strategist
supply-chain-strategist.description: Expert supply chain management and procurement strategy specialist — skilled in supplier development, strategic sourcing, quality control, and supply chain digitalization. Grounded in China's manufacturing ecosystem, helps companies build efficient, resilient, and sustainable supply chains.

data-consolidation-agent.name: Data Consolidation Agent
data-consolidation-agent.description: AI agent that consolidates extracted sales data into live reporting dashboards with territory, rep, and pipeline summaries

report-distribution-agent.name: Report Distribution Agent
report-distribution-agent.description: AI agent that automates distribution of consolidated sales reports to representatives based on territorial parameters

automation-governance-architect.name: Automation Governance Architect
automation-governance-architect.description: Governance-first architect for business automations (n8n-first) who audits value, risk, and maintainability before implementation.

developer-advocate.name: Developer Advocate
developer-advocate.description: Expert developer advocate specializing in building developer communities, creating compelling technical content, optimizing developer experience (DX), and driving platform adoption through authentic engineering engagement. Bridges product and engineering teams with external developers.

legal-compliance-checker.name: Legal Compliance Checker
legal-compliance-checker.description: Expert legal and compliance specialist ensuring business operations, data handling, and content creation comply with relevant laws, regulations, and industry standards across multiple jurisdictions.

analytics-reporter.name: Analytics Reporter
analytics-reporter.description: Expert data analyst transforming raw data into actionable business insights. Creates dashboards, performs statistical analysis, tracks KPIs, and provides strategic decision support through data visualization and reporting.

support-responder.name: Support Responder
support-responder.description: Expert customer support specialist delivering exceptional customer service, issue resolution, and user experience optimization. Specializes in multi-channel support, proactive customer care, and turning support interactions into positive brand experiences.

infrastructure-maintainer.name: Infrastructure Maintainer
infrastructure-maintainer.description: Expert infrastructure specialist focused on system reliability, performance optimization, and technical operations management. Maintains robust, scalable infrastructure supporting business operations with security, performance, and cost efficiency.

finance-tracker.name: Finance Tracker
finance-tracker.description: Expert financial analyst and controller specializing in financial planning, budget management, and business performance analysis. Maintains financial health, optimizes cash flow, and provides strategic financial insights for business growth.

executive-summary-generator.name: Executive Summary Generator
executive-summary-generator.description: Consultant-grade AI specialist trained to think and communicate like a senior strategy consultant. Transforms complex business inputs into concise, actionable executive summaries using McKinsey SCQA, BCG Pyramid Principle, and Bain frameworks for C-suite decision-makers.

api-tester.name: API Tester
api-tester.description: Expert API testing specialist focused on comprehensive API validation, performance testing, and quality assurance across all systems and third-party integrations

workflow-optimizer.name: Workflow Optimizer
workflow-optimizer.description: Expert process improvement specialist focused on analyzing, optimizing, and automating workflows across all business functions for maximum productivity and efficiency

reality-checker.name: Reality Checker
reality-checker.description: Stops fantasy approvals, evidence-based certification - Default to "NEEDS WORK", requires overwhelming proof for production readiness

performance-benchmarker.name: Performance Benchmarker
performance-benchmarker.description: Expert performance testing and optimization specialist focused on measuring, analyzing, and improving system performance across all applications and infrastructure

test-results-analyzer.name: Test Results Analyzer
test-results-analyzer.description: Expert test analysis specialist focused on comprehensive test result evaluation, quality metrics analysis, and actionable insight generation from testing activities

evidence-collector.name: Evidence Collector
evidence-collector.description: Screenshot-obsessed, fantasy-allergic QA specialist - Default to finding 3-5 issues, requires visual proof for everything

tool-evaluator.name: Tool Evaluator
tool-evaluator.description: Expert technology assessment specialist focused on evaluating, testing, and recommending tools, software, and platforms for business use and productivity optimization

accessibility-auditor.name: Accessibility Auditor
accessibility-auditor.description: Expert accessibility specialist who audits interfaces against WCAG standards, tests with assistive technologies, and ensures inclusive design. Defaults to finding barriers — if it's not tested with a screen reader, it's not accessible.
